label: self-released
notes: Archival folder of mixed 2007–2008 recordings. Contains both M4A (GarageBand/iPhone era) and some MP3 files. One of the earliest confirmed archive folders.
body:
Mixed archival folder spanning 2007–2008. Contains both M4A (early GarageBand/iPhone format) and MP3 files, suggesting recordings from multiple sessions across the transition period. Likely predates or is contemporaneous with `freak medicine winter 07` as one of the earliest known recordings.

## Confirmed tracks (from archive filenames)

- ---------aviation.m4a
- 01 Techniques and Materials.mp3
- 01 They Must Be Invisible.m4a
- 01 baby mountain you need time.m4a
- 01 blam (lorazapam).m4a
- 01 maybe seahorse.m4a
- 01 totems totems.mp3
- 02 J.J. Salamander.m4a
- 02 O.M.G. Stress.m4a
- _(additional tracks; full count not yet confirmed)_

## Notes

Track titles suggest the characteristic Colin Ward style already present in 2007–2008: animals, body experiences, and abstract imagery ("baby mountain," "J.J. Salamander," "Techniques and Materials"). The `.mp3` files in this folder are unusual for this period — most early recordings are M4A.
